subcodes.title: Words to two Japanese Baha'is, spoken on 1912-10-04
subcodes.first_line: This is an historic event. It is out of the ordinary that an Iranian should meet Japanese people in San Francisco with such love and harmony.
subcodes.first_line_orig: این از وقوعات تاریخیه است و از امور خارق العاده که شخصی ایرانی با نفوس جاپانی در سانفرانسیسکو
subcodes.subjects: @power of the Manifestation of God, @unity; oneness of humanity
